# Bridger Western Wiki

> Complete wiki and survival guide for Bridger Western, a Roblox survival game set in Ridge B Valley. Covers Stands, Weapons, Cards, acquisition methods, tier rankings, clan coordination, and survival mechanics for the 2026 Alpha version.

## Site Information

- **URL**: https://bridgerwestern.cc/
- **Type**: Game Wiki & Guide
- **Game**: Bridger Western (Roblox)
- **Last Updated**: 2026-04-05
- **Content**: Stands, Weapons, Cards, Guides, Tier Lists

## Available Content

- [Stands Database](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/): Complete Stand roster with tier rankings (S/A/B/Pending)
- [How to Get Stands](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/how-to-get-stand.html): Arrow Shard fishing (0.1% drop rate), Corpse Part KOTH events, water escape tactics, server selection
- [Stand Abilities](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/stand-abilities.html): Complete moveset guide with all Stand skills, keybinds, special mechanics, and passive abilities
- [Practical Video Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/practical-acquisition/): Video-based demonstrations from YouTube gameplay guides, step-by-step walkthroughs, real-time fishing, and Corpse Part chase tactics
- [Stand Tier List](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/stand-tier-list.html): S-tier (The World, D4C, Killer Queen), A-tier (TWAU, King Crimson, Star Platinum, SPTW), B-tier rankings
- [Corpse Part Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/corpse-part-guide.html): KOTH mechanics, probability system (15-20% success rate), body part types, survival tactics
- [Corpse Part Spawn Locations](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/corpse-part-locations/): All 8 confirmed Corpse Part spawn locations with map — Swamp, Anthill Island, Red Corner watch tower, Pit of Doom, Mineshaft, cave, grassy plains, Death Valley
- [Arrow Shard Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/arrow-shard/): Complete Arrow Shard guide — 0.1% fishing drop, guarantees any Stand, not lost on death, cannot be stored or traded
- [Discord Coordination](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/discord-coordination.html): Clan strategies, server flooding methods, team coordination
- [Stands FAQ](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/faq.html): Common questions, troubleshooting, beginner mistakes, Tusk Acts abilities, Hey Ya buffs, PvP counters
- [The World Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/the-world/): RARE time-manipulating Humanoid stand. Long Timestop (~5 seconds), Checkmate passive (knife barrages), Shinei autolock punch.
- [D4C Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/d4c/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand. Dimension Hop passive (requires poncho). Clone Spawn, Clone Swap. Special obtainment: 100 kills, 10 killstreak, Deserts area.
- [Killer Queen Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/killer-queen/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand. Bomb mechanics: Plant Bomb/Detonate, Sheer Heart Attack tracking bomb, Stray Cat air bubble bombs.
- [Star Platinum Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/star-platinum/): RARE time-manipulating Humanoid stand. Skull Breaker execution, Beatdown grab, Time Stop Movement. Can evolve to Star Platinum The World (1% chance).
- [Star Platinum | The World Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/star-platinum-the-world/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand, evolved form of Star Platinum. Rush uppercut, Triple Bearing Shots, 2-second Time Stop, Grab Beatdown.
- [King Crimson Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/king-crimson/): RARE time-manipulating Humanoid stand. Epitaph auto-dodge (G hold), Time Erasure iframes + speed boost (~5s), Donut high-damage punch.
- [Gold Experience Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/gold-experience/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand with Life Giver passive (yellow bar). 7 Page Muda barrage, Life Giver Punch/Tree/Eagle/Scorpions, Self/Other Heal (~30 HP).
- [Gold Experience Requiem Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/gold-experience-requiem/): UNOBTAINABLE/SPEC stand. True Life Giver passive (green bar, 2.5x bigger). Return To Zero nullifies all attacks (60s cooldown). 7 Page Muda 90 dmg.
- [Crazy Diamond Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/crazy-diamond/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand. Restore Mode reverses damage to healing. Tracking Barrage, Facial Reconstruction (10% face change), Blood Slash, Reconstruction Barrage.
- [Tusk Acts 1-3 Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/tusk-acts/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand. Cripple passive (cannot walk or use guns). Obtainable via Saint's Left Arm fusion (2%). Nail Bullets, Nail Glide, Golden Rotation Bullet (62 dmg).
- [Hierophant Green Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/hierophant-green/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand. Tentacle Wire tripwire, Emerald Splash (hold R), 20 Meter Emerald Splash auto-trap, Stand Pilot aerial mode.
- [Silver Chariot Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/silver-chariot/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand. Rapier Uptilt, Lunge (20 dmg), Ricochet Shot (low HP variant), Whirlwind Slash, Armor Removal (speed + dmg boost).
- [Magicians Red Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/magicians-red/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand. Flaming Roundhouse Kick (180 degree burn), Red Bind (cursor flame waves), Crossfire Hurricane Special (splits into 5 projectiles), Stand Pilot.
- [Purple Haze Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/purple-haze/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand with Poison Bulbs passive (own poison can hurt you). Bulb Smash, Poison Bulb Shoot, Poison Bulb Trap (~20s), Stand Pilot.
- [Stone Free Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/stone-free/): DEFAULT Humanoid stand with Thread Weaving passive (M1 surface places thread). Heavy Punch (25 dmg), String Pull, String Patchworks (self-heal), Rock Swing (up to 20 dmg).
- [Whitesnake Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/whitesnake/): RARE time-manipulating Humanoid stand. Disc Grab (disables stand), Disc Throw (inverts controls on direct hit), Acid Spit (sleep effect), Pilot mode.
- [TWAU Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/twau/): RARE time-manipulating Humanoid stand. Checkmate passive (knife barrages). Short Timestop (panic), Long Timestop (~4s, shoot 1 bullet with increased dmg), Autotracking Chop.
- [Hermit Purple Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/hermit-purple/): DEFAULT Non-Humanoid Utility stand. No stamina cost. Grapple (10 dmg, mobility), Chop (10 dmg, dropkick after E on player).
- [Tubular Bells Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/tubular-bells/): DEFAULT Non-Humanoid Utility stand. No stamina cost. Balloon Command, Medium Dog Balloons (15 dmg), Light Snail Balloons (5 dmg, through walls), Heavy Swan Balloon (40 dmg), TUBULAR BELLS!!! (all at once).
- [Hey Ya Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/hey-ya/): DEFAULT Non-Humanoid Utility stand. No stamina cost. Encouragement passive provides random buffs: dodge, damage, healing, speed, accuracy.
- [20th Century Boy Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/20th-century-boy/): DEFAULT Non-Humanoid Utility stand. No stamina cost. Absolute Defense (G, reflects all attacks), Dynamite Strap (V, 12 dmg/dynamite, requires 6 dynamite).
- [Mandom Stand Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/mandom/): RARE time-manipulating Non-Humanoid Utility stand. No stamina cost. Time Rewind (G) returns you and everyone around you 6 seconds back in time including states and health.
- [Stand Skins Gallery](https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/skins/): All Stand shiny skin variants — The World, Star Platinum, D4C, TWAU, Mandom, Hierophant Green, Hermit Purple, Magicians Red. 5% chance on any obtainment roll
- [Weapons Database](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/): Complete weapon guide with primary and secondary weapons, tier 3 dual wield system
- [Primary Weapons](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/primary-weapons.html): 9 primary weapons including Taurus .357, Winchester Repeater, Malcom .70, Bow with arrow switching
- [Secondary Weapons](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/secondary-weapons.html): 6 secondary weapons including Tommy Gun, DB Shotgun, Sabre, Colt Ocelot (requires Tier 3)
- [Weapon Mechanics](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/weapon-mechanics/): Tier 3 dual wield system, Stand penalty, revolver reload mechanics
- [Mares Leg Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/weapons/mares-leg/): Complete guide - 2% fishing drop, 1500 Moola repair, 7 bullets, faster Winchester, Tier 3 required
- [Cards Database](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cards/): Complete Tarot Cards guide with all 25 cards, effects, and acquisition methods
- [All Cards](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cards/all-cards/): Complete list of all 25 Tarot Cards organized by category (Ranged, Melee, Mobility, High Risk, Special Abilities)
- [Card Builds](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cards/card-builds/): Optimized 3-card combinations for bow, gun, melee, and hybrid builds
- [How to Get Cards](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cards/how-to-get-cards/): Mud Witch location in Swamp, 150 Moola per roll, 3-card limit, reroll strategy
- [Cards FAQ](https://bridgerwestern.cc/cards/faq/): Common questions about Tarot Cards, card builds, Mud Witch, reroll strategies
- [Items Database](https://bridgerwestern.cc/items/): Complete Items & Utilities guide with consumables, combat items, and equipment
- [Silver Dagger Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/items/silver-dagger/): Anti-vampire melee weapon, 8 base damage (16 vs vampires), silver fire effect, grab attack
- [Rokakaka Fruit Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/items/rokakaka-fruit/): Split with another Tier 3 player to equalize ages, swap cards, and trade stands (1% shiny chance)
- [Dogbane Herb Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/items/dogbane-herb/): Rare 4% chest drop, trade to Mud Witch for 2500 Moola, age regression -20 years, or Stand removal
- [Items FAQ](https://bridgerwestern.cc/items/faq/): Common questions about items, rare drops, combat utilities, vampire hunting tools
- [Guides Collection](https://bridgerwestern.cc/guides/): Complete collection of game guides covering beginner tutorials, controls, and advanced strategies
- [Complete Beginner Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/guides/beginner-guide/): Comprehensive beginner tutorial covering character creation, starting money, horse selection, and first-hour progression
- [Controls & Keybinds Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/guides/controls/): Complete game controls reference with all keybinds and movement mechanics
- [Fishing Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/fishing/): Complete fishing guide with drop rates, Arrow Shard farming (0.1%), Golden Bass (15k Moola), Moola farming
- [Fishing FAQ](https://bridgerwestern.cc/fishing/faq/): Common fishing questions about Arrow Shards, Golden Bass, drop rates, fishing mechanics
- [Locations Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/locations/): Complete NPCs and shops guide - Gun Store, Mud Witch, Horse Stables, Banker, Blacksmith
- [Bridger Western Map](https://bridgerwestern.cc/locations/map/): Interactive world map showing all locations, NPCs, shops, and points of interest
- [Horse Guide](https://bridgerwestern.cc/locations/horses/): Complete horse guide with stats (Speed, Stamina, Jump, Damage, Scale, Turn), rarities (Common to Mythical), Horse Stables locations
- [Spawn Locations](https://bridgerwestern.cc/locations/spawn-locations/): All Inlaw and Outlaw spawn points, how to change spawn (150 Moola), anti-spawn-kill mechanic (30% auto-change)
- [Locations FAQ](https://bridgerwestern.cc/locations/faq/): Common questions about NPCs, shops, Mud Witch services, Horse Stables, customization costs

## Key Game Mechanics

- **Stand Acquisition**: Arrow Shard fishing (0.1%) or Corpse Part KOTH events (15-20% with holding)
- **Card Acquisition**: Mud Witch in Swamp, 150 Moola per roll, choose 1 from 3 random cards, 3-card maximum per character
- **Items & Utilities**: Ammo Box (& Silver Ammo for vampires), Tonic (healing), Dogbane Herb (4% chest drop, trade for 2500 moola/age regression/stand removal), Dynamite, Molotov, Silver Dagger, Wooden Stake (anti-vampire), Lasso, Poncho (damage reduction), Cowboy Hat (headshot protection), Lantern, Coin (ricochet), Smoke Bomb, Arrow Pack, Knives, Steel Wireset
- **Best Cards**: Archer's Child (bow builds), Desperado (gun builds), Free Runner (universal mobility), EXECUTIONER (headshot kills), Quick Draw (weapon swap)
- **Tusk**: Requires Left Arm Corpse Part (10% chance), causes permanent disability (crawl only, no weapons)
- **Tusk Acts**: Act 1 (Nail Glide + mini-gun spam), Act 2 (Homing bullets + ricochet + traps), Act 3 (Wormhole bullets + double damage)
- **Hey Ya**: Random buff system - dodge, damage, healing, speed, accuracy buffs
- **Water Method**: Escape tactic using water terrain to avoid players during Corpse Part events
- **Clan Monopoly**: S-tier Stands controlled by Discord clans, solo success rate ~5% vs clan 80%+
- **Tier 3 Dual Wield**: Cannot equip both primary and secondary weapons until reaching tier 3
- **Stand Penalty**: Having a Stand decreases base gun damages
- **Revolver Reloads**: Revolvers have wasteful reload mechanics (Taurus .357, Schofield 6, Whitney Dragoon, Colt Ocelot)
